title: Fact Check: Trump's NC Claim on Immigration
summary: Trump misstated facts about a Charlotte murder suspect's immigration status during the State of the Union.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the ongoing debate about immigration policy and the accuracy of political statements.

title: Hayward Pool Filter Plant in Clemmons, NC

title: Florence Airport Traffic Rises, Loses Charlotte Flight
summary: Florence Regional Airport saw increased passenger traffic but lost its American Airlines flight to Charlotte.

title: NC Women Charged in Child Abuse Death
summary: Three women in Charlotte are accused of torturing and killing a girl, keeping her in a dog crate.

title: Man Sentenced for 1994 Charlotte Rape
